summary: project.remove soft-removed the QA project from Skillbox while the project folder and .claude provider folder remained on disk.
Disabling the Claude provider persisted isEnabled=false and did not delete the QA project's .claude provider folder or settings files.
Adding a nonexistent QA project path returned validation_error/path_not_found and did not add a new active project row.

Changing active host from fixture A to fixture B updated Dashboard/Skills source to host B while both host folders remained intact. Existing install-preservation branch was not exercised because the install attempt failed before host switch; no relink/delete occurred.

After a successful global scan with Claude and generic global skills, moving the Claude global skills folder made Global Skills report Claude status missing with no stale Claude current entries and visible warning guidance.

provider.setEnabled saved Claude isEnabled=false, but subsequent global.scan/global.list still returned Claude as active with current global-claude entry. Global scan does not respect disabled provider state.
